name: EvictMapGenerator
author: Vini2309
description: Server-side Evict-style PvP generator with custom always-running rules, Fallen-team neutral cores, safe personal starts, one-time loadouts, five-second Core Shard captures, elimination messages, guarded victory detection, automatic random-seed round resets, normal 1x unit-factory speed and a bounded post-reload connected-player assignment scan.
